title: Amazon MGM Studios Sued by Producer Over Alleged Pay-to-Play Scheme
summary: Joe Eckardt accuses a studio executive of asking for kickbacks in exchange for awarding post production contracts.

title: The gold chart looks poised for a bounce. How to play it for less
summary: If you've been watching the SPDR Gold Shares (GLD), you know the yellow metal has been consolidating and appears to be bouncing off its 150-day moving average (support).

title: BP Buys 40% Stake in Uzbek Oil and Gas Blocks
summary: BP has bought 40% in the production sharing agreement regulating oil and gas exploration and production rights for six blocks in Uzbekistan, setting foot in the Central Asian country as it continues to seek profitable opportunities to boost its oil and gas business. title: Oil price spike turmoil far from over, IEA says as inventories are depleted at “record pace"
summary: The IEA's oil market report for May noted that global oil supply declined by a further 1.8 million barrels per day in April.

title: Japan's Refinery Utilization Hits 73% as Strategic Oil Stocks Flow In
summary: Japan's refinery utilization rates are rebounding in May as releases from petroleum reserves and increased supply of non-Middle East crude are easing the crude supply crunch seen in March and most of April. title: Citi Sees India's Power Demand Rising 5%-6% Annually Amid Energy Buildout
summary: India’s power sector is set to grow by 5-6% each year in the medium term as investments in both thermal and renewable power generation are projected to surge amid growing demand from electrification, data centers, cooling demand, and manufacturing, according to Citi. title: Hormuz closure stalls construction projects as material costs soar
summary: Building schemes around the world are being held up by shortages of products derived from oil
